name: Chris Hemmings
description: Psychotherapist and coach specialising in working with men. Online therapy across the UK, Europe and beyond.

schema.bio: Psychotherapist and coach specialising in working with men, working online with clients across the UK and worldwide. Founder of Men's Therapy Hub and M-Path, former BBC journalist and author of 'Be a Man' (2017).
schema.serviceType: Online psychotherapy and coaching for men
